packageRules.description: Major version bumps often require code changes — require human review.
Keep Rust crate updates isolated because 0.x minor releases often contain breaking changes. Group all minor updates per crate (don't split by individual version).
evalexpr v13 relicensed from MIT to AGPL-3.0 — pin below v13 until migrated to an MIT alternative.
deadpool-redis re-exports redis types — version mismatch causes trait incompatibility.
tiptap 3.23.x breaks editor lifecycle under real relay latency — pin until upstream stabilizes.
